subject: fix(icons): remove inline SVG favicon, use generated PNG from single source
body:
The inline SVG data URL (blue rect with "g") was a second icon design
outside the generation pipeline, violating the single SVG source
principle from APP_ICONS pattern. Replaced with a <link> to the
generated favicon.png (48x48) from icon-source.svg.

All favicons now flow from one source: icon-source.svg → generate-icons.mjs
→ favicon.png (48px, modern browsers) + favicon.ico (32px, legacy).

Tags: icons, cleanup, pwa
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch
